folder_functions.config: Contains the central variables and settings loaded by every other file in the project.
folder_functions.parts: Contains the individual geometry of each physical part (plates and beams). This is where the 'difference' logic for bolt holes occurs.
folder_functions.assemblies: Combines individual components from the 'parts' folder into functional groups, such as a complete wheel unit or the chassis frame.
folder_functions.exports: Specialized scripts that flatten 3D parts for DXF export or prepare components for 3D printing.

file_responsibilities.parameters.scad: The single source of truth for all dimensions (width, length, bolt diameters, drill patterns).
file_responsibilities.bracket_side_plate.scad: The vertical axle holder for the motor bracket (laser-cut component).
file_responsibilities.bracket_top_plate.scad: The horizontal mounting plate for the wheel module (laser-cut component).
file_responsibilities.chassis_beam.scad: Steel hollow profiles featuring pre-calculated drill patterns for assembly.
file_responsibilities.main_base_plate.scad: The primary connecting plate for the upper structure (laser-cut component).
file_responsibilities.upright_wall.scad: Vertical side walls including structural reinforcements (hulls).
file_responsibilities.protection_cover.scad: The outer protective shell that covers the electronics and mechanical parts.
file_responsibilities.wheel_unit_asm.scad: Assembles the hub motor with the top and side plates of the mounting bracket.
file_responsibilities.chassis_frame_asm.scad: Integrates the beams, base plate, and covers into the main structural frame.
file_responsibilities.nesting_laser_cut.scad: Handles 2D projection of all plates to generate DXF files for CNC laser cutting.
file_responsibilities.main_assembly.scad: The primary visualization file that positions the 4 wheel modules and the frame in 3D space.

design_rules: Always use 'include <../config/parameters.scad>' at the top of every sub-file.
Model every part centered (center=true) to ensure easy symmetry and mirroring.
Never use hardcoded numbers; derive all dimensions from the variables in parameters.scad.
Ensure parts intended for DXF export are positioned exactly at Z=0 within their local modules.
